meta.description: An example invocation of a Claude AI skill.

notes.description: Notes on what the skill does or returns in this case.

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_d4f0dd1e_3d79_4eb2_9f67_668d59e9d554" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "invocation" TEXT,
    "notes" TEXT,
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_d4f0dd1e_3d79_4eb2_9f67_668d59e9d554" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_d4f0dd1e3d794eb2_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
